title: Farming Life in Another World Season 2 Unveils Trailer Ahead of April 6 Premiere
tags: Farming Life in Another World Season 2 Unveils New Visual and TrailerFarming Life in Another World Season 2 has revealed a new visual and trailer, which introduces its theme songs, additional cast members, and an April 2026 release date.
